name: MIRAE ASSET MUTUAL FUND - Mirae Asset Nifty 100 ESG Sector Leaders ETF

index.name: NIFTY100 ESG SECTOR LEADERS
index.description: Nifty100 ESG Sector Leaders Index selects top ESG-scoring companies from Nifty 100. ESG screens assess: Environmental (GHG emissions, water usage, waste), Social (labour practices, supply chain, community) and Governance (board independence, audit quality, shareholder rights). Companies with serious ESG controversies are excluded. Research shows ESG-screened portfolios show lower downside volatility and better long-term risk-adjusted returns. India's ESG reporting requirements (BRSR framework under SEBI) are strengthening data quality across listed companies.
